name: regression

name: test_engineer
summary: ADVISORY (non-blocking). Suite strong and substantially non-tautological; round-1 blockers verified genuinely remediated by direct probing (74 passed/1 skipped). 3 non-blocking follow-ups recorded: winner-is-None end-to-end when both deploy configs forged; advisory-config-can-never-win pin; conftest also block subprocess.call/check_call + os.system/os.popen. Mutation leg is the objective bar, not this opinion.
